response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The reference JSON did not contain the complete lyrics, so a manual transcription and translation of Tokino Sora's live performance of 'Mikansei no Chizu' were performed.
2. JSON Usage: The JSON was used to identify the song title and start time, while the lyrics were fully transcribed and translated manually.
3. Timing & Pacing: The subtitles are synchronized directly to the vocal delivery, including her mid-song crowd interactions and chanting.

subtitles.original: 未完成の地図を 輝きに変えて
subtitles.english: Turning this incomplete map into brilliance,

subtitles.original: 誰にも真似できない 足跡を 見てて ねぇ
subtitles.english: watching the footprints that no one else can imitate, okay?

subtitles.original: みんなー！
subtitles.english: Everyone!

subtitles.original: 走り出した願いは 加速していくスピード
subtitles.english: The wishes that have started running are accelerating in speed.

subtitles.original: 目に映るものに 戸惑うなら
subtitles.english: If you are bewildered by what you see...

subtitles.original: 仮想世界だって 私が見えてるでしょう？
subtitles.english: Even in a virtual world, you can see me, right?

subtitles.original: 君だけにある世界が 世界
subtitles.english: The world that exists only for you, the world...

subtitles.original: ドキドキは 泣き出したくもなるよ
subtitles.english: The excitement sometimes makes me want to cry,

subtitles.original: だけどときどきが 胸を締め付ける ロマンティカ
subtitles.english: but sometimes it tightens my chest—Romantica!

subtitles.original: 大きく手を振って 君に届けたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to wave my hands big and reach you!

subtitles.original: 笑顔になって 未来を見に行こうよ
subtitles.english: Let's smile and go see the future!

subtitles.original: 明けない夜だって 光のダイヤ探して
subtitles.english: Even in an endless night, search for a diamond of light.

subtitles.original: 平気だよ 一緒に笑いたいから
subtitles.english: It's okay, because I want to laugh together!

subtitles.original: きれいになって ちょっぴり自信持って
subtitles.english: Become beautiful and have a little confidence.

subtitles.original: 目から目だって ここで歌いたいの
subtitles.english: Eye to eye, I want to sing here!

subtitles.original: いつもより少し 大きな声で もっと
subtitles.english: With a slightly louder voice than usual, more...

subtitles.original: きゅんと胸を掴んで 離さないよね？
subtitles.english: grab my heart tightly and don't let go, okay?

subtitles.original: ねー！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: 声がちょっと小さいかも！
subtitles.english: Your voices might be a little quiet!

subtitles.original: スポットライトもうちょっと 当てて聞いてたい特等
subtitles.english: Shine the spotlight a little more, I want to listen from the best seat.

subtitles.original: 不安も全部巻き込んで上がるステージで
subtitles.english: On this rising stage, sweeping up all the anxiety...

subtitles.original: おしとやかになって これが私のロックンロール！
subtitles.english: Become graceful—this is my rock 'n' roll!

subtitles.original: 君だけに見せたい 私の世界
subtitles.english: I want to show only you my world!

subtitles.original: みんな声出していくよ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, let me hear your voices!

subtitles.original: せーの、ワン、ツー！
subtitles.english: Ready, one, two!

subtitles.original: ハイ！ハイ！ハイ！ハイ！
subtitles.english: Hi! Hi! Hi! Hi!

subtitles.original: ハイ！ハイ！ハイ！ハイ！
subtitles.english: Hi! Hi! Hi! Hi!

subtitles.original: ハイ！ハイ！ハイ！ハイ！
subtitles.english: Hi! Hi! Hi! Hi!

subtitles.original: ハイ！ハイ！ハイ！ハイ！
subtitles.english: Hi! Hi! Hi! Hi!
